query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `translation_cache` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `source_hash` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `target_lang` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `source_text` text NOT NULL,
  `translated_text` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `translation_cache_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `idx_hash_lang` (`source_hash`, `target_lang`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZhmXq2fuwbq2e6E.b3f96895581d --database 9L2UFkGMTFNGvGrFPN8jYv --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `translation_cache` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `source_hash` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `target_lang` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `source_text` text NOT NULL,
  `translated_text` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `translation_cache_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `idx_hash_lang` (`source_hash`, `target_lang`)
);
